title: Alive Mods
description: A modpack focused on performance, mechanical mods, decoration, and quality of life.
body:
![Banner Image](https://i.imgur.com/d7HZveH.png) Alive Mods is a modpack focused on performance, mechanical mods, decoration, and quality of life. This also has a beta version of Alive Textures which tweaks some building blocks and the GUI. Heres a detailed explanation to all mods and changes: **Performance**:
Even though this modpack is based on Forge, that didn't stop me from using mods like Rubudium, Oculus and others, which are forge ports of the popular mods Sodium and Iris. **Additions**:
One of the mechanical mods I added was of course Create, which I think is one of the best mods out there. I also added some addons for Create, Pretty Pipes, and more.
Also don't you think Minecraft doesn't have that much food options? That's why I added Farmers Delight, so you can find wild crops, farm them and cook them into full meals. I also added some addons to that mod to add even more food.
I wanted to add more decoration, so I added a furniture mod, obviously adding tables, chairs, beds, and more. I also added some mods that add more varieties to wood and stone. Speaking of varieties, I added some mods which adds more varieties to doors, trapdoors, and fences, and you can make varieties of the normal blocks with a chisel, using Rechiseled.
Since Minecraft needs better storage in my opinion, I added Iron Chests, Iron Barrels, Iron Shulkers and Iron Furnaces, which are tiered storage containers which offer more slots, and with the furnaces, the better the tier the faster it smelts, and it has augments which are like upgrades for the furnace. **Quality of Life**:
Inventory Profiles Next is a mod that adds sort buttons and other inventory/storage upgrades to Minecraft, Better advancements just makes the advancement screen bigger, Corpse keeps all your items and armor inside a corpse when you die, Clumps clumps up the XP orbs, and Double Doors automatically opens the 2 doors when you click on 2 doors. **World & Sounds**:
Terralith is one of the most popular world generation mods and I can see why, because the biomes are so beautiful! It is also paired with Incendium, Nullscape, and Structory which change the rest of the dimensions and adds more structures.
To make the world feel more *alive*, I added AmbientSounds, which adds wind, birds, water, and other ambient sounds which just adds way more to the feeling of Minecraft. Speaking of sounds, I added SoundPhysicsRemastered, which adds reverb to the inside of large structures. Along with all this, I also added a mod to tweak the sounds of some blocks. Those are the main changes of the modpack, there are way more mods to this pack and to see what they do, download the pack! Feel free to showcase and make content on this modpack, just please credit it! ## Alive Alive is a part of DuckyHQ. See my other projects at my website. Join my Discord to report bugs, request features, and hand out with the community. Also check out the Fabric version, its aimed for content creators. If you dont plan on doing content then I highly recommend playing the normal forge version. (the one you're looking at right now) And finally, check out my resource pack! [![Discord Link](https://i.imgur.com/T47lwtj.png)](https://discord.gg/kVS5dEekmT) [![Website Link](https://i.imgur.com/VLVP0L0.png)](https://www.duckyhq.com) [![Alive Mods Fabric](https://i.imgur.com/emhwyR5.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alive-mods-fabric) [![Alive Textures](https://i.imgur.com/kQHAX4W.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alive-textures) ## Credits
